name: South University Farmers Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October

Products.value: Local produce from farmers; other vendor products (food, artisan goods) allowed with market manager approval

Address.value: 5859 S University Blvd, Greenwood Village, CO 80121

notes: On-file website 'https://outhuniversityfarmersmarket.com' was a typo (missing 's') for the real official site https://southuniversityfarmersmarket.com, run by operator Elephant Rock Farm, which manages several Denver-metro markets including this one. The site's homepage/'farmersmarkets' application page currently displays a Sedalia, CO address (5607 US-85) for a 2024 listing labeled 'South University Farmers Market', which appears to be stale/mismatched content on that page; the site's own 'store-locator' page (listing all 5 markets the operator runs separately) confirms this specific market is still at 5859 S University Blvd, Greenwood Village, CO 80121, Fridays 10am-2pm, May 7-Oct 29, so that page was used as the authoritative source for address/hours/months. On-file zip 80212 appears incorrect (that's a Denver zip); corrected to 80121 per the official site. No SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, or certified-organic statements found on the official site.
